_comment: Search-only synonym index for the product catalog. Keys are the canonical raw_product_title (matched case-insensitively). Values are extra terms that widen /api/products and /api/products/search matching ONLY. These terms are NEVER used for display, product identity, claim-safe copy, or prompt compilation — they exist purely so a marketing alias finds its canonical row. Extend this map to give any canonical product additional searchable synonyms.

Bosmax Herbs 5 ML: bosmax herbs herbal oil roll on
